content: Invoice and payment mutations are server-authoritative: use Edge Functions and avoid direct client CRUD uploads for financial tables.

name: Edge function release flow
description: After editing Supabase Edge Function source, deploy functions explicitly; DB migrations update schema/policies but do not publish function runtime code.

name: Snapshot-aware dashboard fallbacks
description: Dashboard now reads daily snapshot aggregates when present and falls back to transactional queries for missing days/today to prevent blank charts during sync lag.

name: Dashboard aggregate wiring
description: Dashboard KPI and chart providers now use snapshot-aware repository methods with transactional fallback, enabling immediate behavior while snapshots sync in.

title: Three-axis invoice state model
rationale: Lifecycle (status), payment_status, and fulfillment_status are now treated as independent axes; approved+paid+fulfilled is the operational completion condition.

name: No auto-fulfill on payment
description: record_payment now updates payment_status/amount only; fulfillment is explicit via fulfill_sale to preserve release control and inventory timing.

name: Void guard with payments
description: Void is blocked when any payment exists; users must delete payments first, preventing lifecycle rollback while financial state remains non-zero.

content: BranchSelectionNotifier initialization is deferred with WidgetsBinding.addPostFrameCallback instead of Future.microtask to keep Notifier.build side-effect safe.

title: Commissions branch-scoped via sale linkage
rationale: Commissions do not carry branch_id directly, so report/detail/payout filters are enforced by joining or subquerying sales.sale_id -> sales.branch_id.

description: create-invoice web calls surfaced as ClientException Failed to fetch when browser blocked responses missing CORS headers on success/catch paths.
resolution: Return cors headers for both success and catch responses in create-invoice and redeploy edge function; verify OPTIONS preflight returns allow-origin/allow-headers/allow-methods.
